context: Tests whether the agent reads policy.state to exclude unavailable models, uses the capabilities.limits.max_context_window_tokens field (not model names) for context window comparisons, and applies category tags for task-type matching. Includes a trap: gpt-4-legacy has vision but is disabled; o3-ultra has large context but is preview.

checklist.name: Excludes disabled model
checklist.description: Report does NOT recommend gpt-4-legacy for the screenshot task (policy.state is 'disabled')

checklist.name: Flags preview limitation
checklist.description: Report notes that o3-ultra has restricted availability or should be verified before use (policy.state is 'preview')

checklist.name: Context from capabilities field
checklist.description: Context window sizes cited in the report match the capabilities.limits.max_context_window_tokens values from the JSON — not guessed from model name

checklist.name: Vision capability checked
checklist.description: Screenshot task recommendation is based on capabilities.supports.vision === true (not assumed from model name)

checklist.name: Fast tag for docstrings
checklist.description: Quick docstring task recommendation references a model tagged 'fast' (claude-haiku-4-5 or gpt-5-turbo)

checklist.name: Enabled-only for production
checklist.description: All models recommended for production pipeline use have policy.state === 'enabled'
